meta.title: OBID SOBITOV — Luxury Watches & Designer Pieces
meta.description: A luxury concierge boutique in Tashkent. Original watches, designer clothing, bags and accessories. We source any luxury piece on request.

hero.sub: Original timepieces, designer clothing and rare accessories — curated with impeccable taste.

featured.title: Rare Timepieces
featured.subtitle: Pieces hand-picked from the world's most prestigious manufactures.

categories.title: Every taste, under one roof
categories.subtitle: Each department is filled with a selection worthy of the occasion.

concierge.title: We bring it to you
concierge.body: Any piece from any boutique in the world — a watch, a bag or a garment — delivered original and guaranteed. You imagine it; we find it.

original.title: 100% Original
original.text: Every piece is presented with verified authenticity.

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.text: With official documents and the boutique's own guarantee.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.subtitle: A carefully curated collection of luxury pieces.

authenticity.title: Authenticity guaranteed
authenticity.text: Every piece is verified by our experts and delivered with its original documentation.

delivery.title: Discreet delivery
delivery.text: Secure delivery across Tashkent. Shipping to the regions by arrangement.

product.telegramMessage: Hello! I'm interested in this piece: {name} ({brand}). Price: {price}.

concierge.title: We source any luxury piece
concierge.lead: Looking for a specific model, a limited edition or a hard-to-find piece? Simply tell us — we handle everything from the search to the delivery.

one.title: Tell us
one.text: A link, a photo or a simple description — however you picture the piece.

two.title: We source it
two.text: Through trusted sources we confirm price and authenticity, then prepare an offer.

three.title: We deliver
three.text: The piece reaches you original, guaranteed and securely.

form.title: Leave a request
form.name: Your name
form.itemPlaceholder: e.g. Rolex Datejust 41, silver, or a link to the item
form.notesPlaceholder: Size, colour, timing or any other wishes

success.title: Your request has been received
success.text: We'll be in touch shortly. If you like, you can also send the request instantly via Telegram.

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyHint: Choose the finest pieces for yourself from our catalog.
cart.note: Prices are shown in UZS. The final amount is confirmed at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Enter your details to complete the order.

payment.title: Payment method
payment.subtitle: Choose a convenient method. Payment integration will be connected soon.
payment.paymeHint: By card or the Payme app

success.title: Your order has been received
success.text: Thank you! Our manager will contact you shortly to confirm the order.

checkout.empty: Your cart is empty for checkout.

about.title: Taste is trust in the details
about.lead: OBID SOBITOV is a personal boutique in Tashkent that unites luxury and trust. We don't simply sell pieces — we offer every client a rare kind of attention and taste.
about.story1: We brought the world of leading watch manufactures, designer houses and rare accessories closer to Tashkent. Every choice is a harmony of taste, authenticity and effortless service.
about.story2: Our clients stay with us not for a single purchase but for a lifetime — because behind every piece stands a name, a guarantee and a personal relationship.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.text: Only original pieces, from verified sources.

discretion.title: Discretion
discretion.text: Every client relationship is private and personal.

care.title: Attention
care.text: From selection to delivery, every detail matters.

footer.tagline: A luxury boutique in Tashkent. Original watches, designer pieces and a personal concierge service.

newsletter.title: Hear about new arrivals first
newsletter.text: Be the first to know about private collections and curated pieces.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Your collection of saved pieces.
wishlist.emptyHint: Save the pieces you love with the heart icon.

lookbook.title: Style is the language of detail
lookbook.body: Every piece is an expression of taste and character. Discover your own style through our selection.

one.text: Bought my Rolex here with complete confidence. Service and authenticity — impeccable.
one.author: Jamshid A.

two.text: Through the concierge they brought a bag from Paris. Fast and honest.
two.author: Dilnoza R.

three.text: True luxury and a personal touch. Highly recommend.
three.author: Sardor K.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist.
